issue.title: music.bugs.co.kr

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://music.bugs.co.kr/search](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmusic.bugs.co.kr%2Fsearch) ### Comment > 음악 스트리밍 사이트 벅스 music.bugs.co.kr 에서 검색어를 입력했을시 해당 스크린샷 처럼 아무것도 뜨지 않는 현상이 간간히 발생합니다 예전에 추적 보호에서 ip주소 숨기기를 했을때는 어떤걸 검색해도 스크린샷 같이 아무것도 뜨지 않는 현상이 발생했었거든요 그래서 이 옵션은 해제를 하고 사용하고 있는데.. 검색어를 입력할때마다 이런 현상이 간간히 자주 발생하고 있어서 이번에도 애드 가드 문제가 아닐까 생각중입니다 어떤 옵션 때문인지 이런 현상이 생기는지는 잘 모르겠습니다 간간히 발생하는것이라 다시 검색하면 제대로 뜰때가 많아서 옵션을 하나 하나 껏다 켰다 해서 이 옵션이 문제인지 아닌지 확실하게 알수가 없습니다 5월달부터 해당 문제가 발생한것 같고 그렇게 오래 되지는 않았습니다 추적 보호나 네트워크 관련 문제인듯 한데 도저히 어떤것인지 알수 없어서 답답합니다 어떤것 때문인지 확실하게 말해 드릴수 없어서 정말 죄송합니다 ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://music.bugs.co.kr/search](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmusic.bugs.co.kr%2Fsearch) ### Comment > 음악 스트리밍 사이트 벅스 music.bugs.co.kr 에서 검색어를 입력했을시 해당 스크린샷 처럼 아무것도 뜨지 않는 현상이 간간히 발생합니다 예전에 추적 보호에서 ip주소 숨기기를 했을때는 어떤걸 검색해도 스크린샷 같이 아무것도 뜨지 않는 현상이 발생했었거든요 그래서 이 옵션은 해제를 하고 사용하고 있는데.. 검색어를 입력할때마다 이런 현상이 간간히 자주 발생하고 있어서 이번에도 애드 가드 문제가 아닐까 생각중입니다 어떤 옵션 때문인지 이런 현상이 생기는지는 잘 모르겠습니다 간간히 발생하는것이라 다시 검색하면 제대로 뜰때가 많아서 옵션을 하나 하나 껏다 켰다 해서 이 옵션이 문제인지 아닌지 확실하게 알수가 없습니다 5월달부터 해당 문제가 발생한것 같고 그렇게 오래 되지는 않았습니다 추적 보호나 네트워크 관련 문제인듯 한데 도저히 어떤것인지 알수 없어서 답답합니다 어떤것 때문인지 확실하게 말해 드릴수 없어서 정말 죄송합니다 ### Screenshots

issue.title: Real Cookie Banner content blockers
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Windows, AdGuard Browser Extension

### AdGuard version

5.4.3.1

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc.

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Microsoft Edge

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://not.applicable

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Sorry about the late follow up on issue #219254. 

I noticed that you added `metashare.com/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner-pro/` to the `cookies_allowlist.txt`. This will only help with one of our websites. The WordPress plugin is available on wordpress.org so it can be used anywhere.

May I suggest that you allow `/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner-pro/` as well as `/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner/` for any host? The latter is to include the free version of the Real Cookie Banner WordPress plugin.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://mosvodokanal.ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmosvodokanal.ru%2F) ### Comment > Не открывается сайт https://mosvodokanal.ru/ и его поддомены при включенном AdGuard, как только его отключаешь, даже без перезагрузки браузера всё работает, сайт открывается, но как только запускаешь AdGuard сайт перестает открываться и выдает ошибку соединения. Даже если при включенном AdGuard добавляешь в браузере "Не проверять данный сайт", он всё равно не открывается, проверено на 30 компьютерах. Отключая в приложении AdGuard включенные компоненты: "Блокировка рекламы", "Защита от фишинга", "DNS защита", "Расширения" - сайт всё равно не открывается, только при полном отключении AdGuard. Огромная просьба решить данную проблему с открытием сайта АО Мосводоканал и его поддоменов (https://onewind.mosvodokanal.ru/#loginview). Заранее огромное спасибо! ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/l9i8pykd0rkgko84kkc44sckwccowgc30smf2t0qby.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/q9p6qafzaas40k0gcg4sc8g4kc4044ka2pruiy8ufc.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.36 MV3 System version: | `Windows 10` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Russian filter Filters last update: | 2026-06-02T21:01:08Z ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.info/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.36&system_version=Windows+10&ext.manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&regular_filters=1%2C2%2C10&filters_last_update=2026-06-02T21%3A01%3A08Z&stealth.enabled=0)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://mosvodokanal.ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmosvodokanal.ru%2F) ### Comment > Не открывается сайт https://mosvodokanal.ru/ и его поддомены при включенном AdGuard, как только его отключаешь, даже без перезагрузки браузера всё работает, сайт открывается, но как только запускаешь AdGuard сайт перестает открываться и выдает ошибку соединения. Даже если при включенном AdGuard добавляешь в браузере "Не проверять данный сайт", он всё равно не открывается, проверено на 30 компьютерах. Отключая в приложении AdGuard включенные компоненты: "Блокировка рекламы", "Защита от фишинга", "DNS защита", "Расширения" - сайт всё равно не открывается, только при полном отключении AdGuard. Огромная просьба решить данную проблему с открытием сайта АО Мосводоканал и его поддоменов (https://onewind.mosvodokanal.ru/#loginview). Заранее огромное спасибо! ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 4 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: Real Cookie Banner content blockers

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Windows, AdGuard Browser Extension

### AdGuard version

5.4.3.1

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc.

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Microsoft Edge

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://not.applicable

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Sorry about the late follow up on issue #219254. 

I noticed that you added `metashare.com/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner-pro/` to the `cookies_allowlist.txt`. This will only help with one of our websites. The WordPress plugin is available on wordpress.org so it can be used anywhere.

May I suggest that you allow `/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner-pro/` as well as `/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner/` for any host? The latter is to include the free version of the Real Cookie Banner WordPress plugin.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
> nowhere yet - but as the filter is currently defined we would see this issue again as soon as we add a YouTube embed to any other of our websites

It would be best to clarify exactly which websites you were referring to. I haven't seen any other reports like the one mentioned, so there's no point in adding a wide exception yet. Especially without any actual examples.

> instead of just for our product website metashare.com

If a similar issue occurs on another website, our rules may be adjusted.

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: Real Cookie Banner content blockers

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Windows, AdGuard Browser Extension

### AdGuard version

5.4.3.1

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc.

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Microsoft Edge

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://not.applicable

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Sorry about the late follow up on issue #219254. 

I noticed that you added `metashare.com/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner-pro/` to the `cookies_allowlist.txt`. This will only help with one of our websites. The WordPress plugin is available on wordpress.org so it can be used anywhere.

May I suggest that you allow `/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner-pro/` as well as `/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner/` for any host? The latter is to include the free version of the Real Cookie Banner WordPress plugin.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
@zloyden nowhere yet - but as the filter is currently defined we would see this issue again as soon as we add a YouTube embed to any other of our websites. I am asking if it is possible to allow the Real Cookie Banner WordPress plugin on any website on the internet instead of just for our product website metashare.com? I believe this would be more beneficial for the community. 

See previous issue #219254 for more context.

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Windows, AdGuard Browser Extension

### AdGuard version

5.4.3.1

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc.

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Microsoft Edge

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://not.applicable

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Sorry about the late follow up on issue #219254. 

I noticed that you added `metashare.com/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner-pro/` to the `cookies_allowlist.txt`. This will only help with one of our websites. The WordPress plugin is available on wordpress.org so it can be used anywhere.

May I suggest that you allow `/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner-pro/` as well as `/wp-content/plugins/real-cookie-banner/` for any host? The latter is to include the free version of the Real Cookie Banner WordPress plugin.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

### Issue URL (Ads) [https://aha-music.com/url](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Faha-music.com%2Furl) ### Comment > First, create an account on their site, here: https://aha-music.com/login > > After that, go to https://aha-music.com/url, wait for the captcha verification to complete and insert a URL from YouTube (it can be any video from the platform). Click on "Analyze Video". > > Now it's going to ask you to watch 8 ads in order to scan the video for which music is played on it. > > If you press the "Watch a short ad to identify music" it's going to fail showing me the ad, obviously. > > This also happens without an account. Go to https://aha-music.com/url, insert any video link you find from YouTube, and it's going to ask you the same. ``` Username: @playonevideo ``` ### Screenshots
